classify_aws_command: classify an aws cli command as read, mutate, auth, or unknown risk level
redact_aws_secrets: redact aws access keys, secret keys, and session tokens from command output text
review_AwsRisk_enum: review the AwsRisk enum that defines read, mutate, auth, and unknown risk categories
review_AwsCommandInfo_dataclass: review the AwsCommandInfo dataclass that holds aws command classification results including service and operation
summarize_aws_safety_module: summarize the aws_safety module that classifies aws commands and redacts credentials from output
